fOptimizer.hint.cacheScope: Per-machine cache. Entries are keyed by (model, 50 ms cadence bucket). Wipe when hardware, KataGo version, or proxy configuration changes.

knobRegistry.floorTooltip.engine.first-r: Upstream floor: KataGo silently substitutes the cadence value for first-report timings below ~35 ms. Lower values do not take effect.
cards.decks.contextIdsTooltip: Comma-separated root-card ids fed to the deck pipeline. Use {0} (or {1}) to expand a game-source id to all of its root card ids — resolved client-side from the loaded forest stats.
cards.decks.startReviewTooltip: Run the pipeline and immediately start a review session against the matched cards.
cards.decks.runPipelineTooltip: Run the pipeline and populate the forest in browse mode (no review).
cards.browse.gameIdTooltip: Game source id — usable in the Cards-tab context-id field as {0}
cards.browse.rootIdTooltip: Root card id — usable directly in the Cards-tab context-id field
cards.browse.moreAffordance: + {n} more — collapse and select the parent game to load all roots
cards.lineage.switchToVertical: Switch to vertical layout (root on top)
cards.lineage.switchToHorizontal: Switch to horizontal layout (root on left)
cards.lineage.emptyDecks: Run a deck to populate the view.
cards.lineage.emptyBrowse: Select a game or root in the navigator.
cards.lineage.collapseAllTooltip: Clear every manually-expanded stub and bucket in this tree (other trees' expansion is preserved)

match.subtitle: Engines play forward from the current position. Click STOP MATCH on the toolbar to interrupt at any point.
match.singleEngineNote: Proxy is not in SELECTOR mode — both colours play through the single connected engine ({label}).
match.hint.stopAnytime: The match runs on its own WebSocket; the singleton analysis service stays available throughout.

toolbar.engineModelTooltipPending: KataGo loaded model (refreshed on each connect / reconnect). Probe pending.

toolbar.metric.scoreLeadTooltip: Score lead in points from White's perspective (positive = White ahead).

errors.boundary.body: The application hit an unexpected error. The system log has the details. Reload the page to continue.

analysis.persist.title: Saved Analyses
analysis.persist.confirmDiscard: Discard the saved analyses for this board?
analysis.persist.errorQuota: Storage quota reached: {current} of {quota}. Discard a saved bundle to free space.
analysis.persist.errorUnknownScheme: Server cannot decode this stored bundle. Contact your operator.
analysis.persist.errorGeneric: Save failed; see system log for details.
analysis.persist.tooltip:
Experimental — opt-in feature, in active testing.

Save captures whatever the analysis ledger holds for this board right now. Ownership maps and policy heads are only included if the matching overlay was enabled BEFORE the engine ran the analysis — disabling an overlay later does not retroactively add its data to a saved bundle.

Re-saving overwrites the previous bundle entirely; there is no per-record merge.

Closing a board deletes its saved bundle from the server. Bundles auto-restore when the board reappears (e.g., on next SPA load).

Saving may become transparent (automatic) in a future release once we have operational confidence.
analysis.adaptive.tooltip: Adaptive re-evaluation: after the original analysis completes, the proxy re-runs the worst-quantile turns at extra visits and streams the deeper results back as updates. Useful on long range queries where the engine's first pass surfaces moves worth a closer look. Off by default — adaptive's deeper pass changes the visit count of resulting packets, which surprises consumers expecting a specific maxVisits (review-session grading, for example, relies on the card's recorded visit count).
analysis.adaptive.maxRoundsTooltip: Number of select-and-deepen passes per query. 1 = single-shot (default; matches the v1.0.23 wire shape). Higher values run the loop N times: each round re-runs the worst-quantile selection against the latest state, and with the learned value function the deepening set naturally rotates as turns get deepened. Practical ceiling at default budget is ~3–4 rounds before the candidate set's segment-1 capacity saturates; further rounds re-spawn cache-hit subqueries that don't add compute.
analysis.adaptive.hint: Worst quantile: fraction of moves to re-evaluate (0.05 = top 5% of worst moves; proxy default is 0.25). Extra visits: added to original maxVisits for the deeper pass (proxy default is 800; increment-not-absolute, so the NN cache continues from where the original left off). Max rounds: how many times the loop re-runs (1 = single-shot).
analysis.adaptive.valueBinding.label: Value function
analysis.adaptive.valueBinding.experimen: Phase 3.5 LightGBM-supervised predictor. Optimized for modern game positions (~2000+); historical professional records (Shusaku, Dosaku, Go Seigen, Huang Longshi, Fan Xiping, etc.) may benefit from the default built-in allocation instead. Expect ~0.85-0.90 efficiency on modern games vs ~0.46 for the built-in baseline.
palette.systemMessage.parameterLocked: Parameter "{name}" is currently locked by {holder}; the edit was refused.
palette.param.qeuboTooltipReady: Mark this parameter as PBO-controlled. Toggling recreates the calibration experiment over the new controlled set.
palette.param.qeuboTooltipNeedRange: Set a valid [min, max] range first (min < max).
palette.param.qeuboRangeInvalidActive: Range invalid — PBO experiment continues with the snapshot taken at create. Fix the range and re-toggle to apply.
palette.param.qeuboRangeInvalidPassive: Set a valid [min, max] range to enable PBO control.

cardSet.field.name: Name:
cardSet.harness.empty: No hyperparameters declared. Use a bare identifier in the pipeline to introduce one.
cardSet.harness.col.name: Name
cardSet.harness.col.label: Label
cardSet.harness.placeholder.label: (optional)
harnessPrompt.title: Pipeline Hyperparameters
harnessPrompt.lede: This deck declares values bound at run time. Defaults are pre-filled; edit any field then click Run.
qeubo.tooltip.applied: Preview the parameters currently in use. Switch to A or B to compare PBO's candidates.
qeubo.tooltip.candidateA: Preview PBO candidate A. Use the verdict buttons to register your A-vs-B preference.
qeubo.tooltip.candidateB: Preview PBO candidate B. Use the verdict buttons to register your A-vs-B preference.
qeubo.tooltip.preferA: Submit your preference for A. The optimizer updates its model and proposes a new pair.
qeubo.tooltip.preferB: Submit your preference for B. The optimizer updates its model and proposes a new pair.
qeubo.tooltip.useThis: Promote the current preview (A or B) to the persistent palette parameters. Future analyses will use these values.
qeubo.tooltip.pin: Save the current preview as a named bookmark for cross-session comparison.
qeubo.phaseTooltip: PBO calibrates palette parameters by Bayesian preference learning: it proposes a pair (A vs B), you register your preference, and a Gaussian process refines its model. The Applied/A/B toggle previews each variant; "Use this" promotes the current preview to the persistent parameters; "Pin" saves it as a named bookmark. GP fitting cost is cubic in the number of observations, so each iteration is slower than the last — stop voting once successive bests stabilise (no hard cap is enforced).
qeuboBookmarks.tooltip.newFromCurrent: Snapshot the currently applied analysis_env.parameters as a new bookmark
qeuboBookmarks.emptyState: No bookmarks yet. Pin from the toolbar during a calibration session, or click "+ New from current" to snapshot the values currently in {code}.
qeuboInternal.bootstrapFailed: PBO bootstrap failed; calibration status unknown.
qeuboInternal.bookmarkApplyRefused: PBO: bookmark apply refused — {names} currently under hard claim.
auth.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.sessionNotRecognised: Session not recognised by the server. Please sign in again.
auth.verifyFailed: Could not verify identity with server ({msg}). Using cached identity.
sync.workspaceLoadFailed: Sync: workspace did not load. Your changes will not persist this session.
sync.abortedSaveIdentityGate: Sync: aborted save (identity gate). Please report.
sync.saveFailed: Sync: failed to save workspace. Your recent changes are not on the server yet.
analysis.proxyMissingDeltaAnalysis: KataGo proxy advertises capabilities but does not list `delta_analysis`. Per-move grading and analysis-tab enrichment cannot run on this proxy. Disconnecting.
analysis.proxyMissingTransposition: Transposition toggle is on, but the KataGo proxy does not advertise the `transposition` capability. Cluster rings will not appear; flip the toggle off in the registry to suppress this warning, or check that the proxy was built with the `goboard_transposition` module.
analysis.ponderExhausted: Ponder reached its visit ceiling ({visits}). Your hardware is fast enough that ponder finished before you stopped it — consider raising `engine.katago.ponderMaxVisits` in the registry editor.
review.kataGoTimeout: KataGo did not respond within {seconds}s. Review cancelled.
review.missingPerMoveDelta: KataGo's response carried no per-move quality score for the move you played (player={color}, per-color move index {index}). Review cancelled. This usually points at a misconfigured palette or a proxy enrichment failure.
review.session.allSuspended: All {n} matched cards are suspended — no review queue. Inspect each card in the Browse view (or the Lineage Explorer) to unsuspend the ones you want to study.
review.session.someSuspended: {dropped} of {total} matched cards are suspended and were excluded from this review queue.
cardMetadata.title: Card metadata
cardMetadata.analysisConfigTooltip: Inline editing of `analysis_config` is intentionally deferred — its design space and downstream effects need more thought before exposing a panel-level UI. For now, edit it through the registry editor.
cardMetadata.resetPriorInlineHint: This card's review history was based on a different target-moves value. If you want the review schedule to start over, tick this box; if you believe the existing posterior still carries useful signal for the new shape, leave it unticked.
cardMetadata.resetPriorStandaloneTooltip: Reset this card's Ebisu prior (α, β, t) to defaults, clearing its review-history record. Use when the prior is corrupted by mistaken reviews.
cardMetadata.resetPriorStandaloneConfirm: Reset this card's review history? The Ebisu prior will return to defaults and the review schedule will start over. This cannot be undone.
lineage.fetchFailedBrowse: Lineage Explorer: {count} tree(s) ({head}{tail}) could not be fetched. First failure: {reason}.
lineage.fetchFailedDeck: Lineage Explorer: {count} tree(s) ({head}{tail}) could not be fetched — matched cards in those trees won't be visible in the forest. First failure: {reason}.
